title: Psychotria intrudens

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms associated with various conditions such as fever, colds, and infections. The bioactive constituents of Psychotria intrudens include phenolic compounds, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote immune function and overall well-being.
